name: defi-pools
description: Scan Uniswap V2 pools for all configured token pairs. Reads reserves, computes TVL, price ratios, and imbalance percentages to identify yield opportunities.

tokenSymbols.description: Comma-separated token symbols matching tokenAddresses order

tokenDecimals.description: Comma-separated token decimals matching tokenAddresses order

coingeckoIds.description: Comma-separated CoinGecko IDs matching tokenAddresses order
